vocab.meaning: ảnh hưởng mang tính hình thành (nhân cách/tư duy)
vocab.example: My literature teacher was a major formative influence on my decision to pursue a career in journalism.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy niềm đam mê đối với
vocab.example: She had a unique way of teaching chemistry that truly ignited a passion for science in all her students.
What I loved most about him was his approachable demeanor, which made it easy to ask for help whenever I was stuck.

vocab.meaning: nhận được sự tôn trọng (từ mọi người)
vocab.example: He didn't need to raise his voice; his profound knowledge and integrity naturally commanded respect from the whole class.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu đậm
vocab.example: Her unconventional teaching methods left a lasting impression on me, even years after I graduated.
Beyond her subject expertise, her exceptional pedagogical skills meant that even the most complex theories became clear.
He was the kind of mentor who would go out of his way to nurture talent in students who lacked self-confidence.

vocab.meaning: có lợi cho việc học tập
vocab.example: She always fostered a classroom environment that was highly conducive to learning and open discussion.
My history professor was a wealth of knowledge, often sharing fascinating anecdotes that weren't in the textbooks.

vocab.meaning: truyền cho (ai đó) sự tự tin
vocab.example: He had an incredible ability to instil confidence in his students, pushing us to tackle challenges we thought were impossible.
